title: Backend Developer Specialist
description: Qualifications & Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related technical field Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience in backend software development Strong expertise in .NET Core, C#, Web API, and Entity Framework Core Solid understanding and practical experience with Clean Architecture and Domain Driven Design (DDD) principles Proven experience in designing scalable, high-performance, and maintainable backend systems Strong proficiency in MS SQL (required); experience with PostgreSQL and/or MongoDB is a plus Hands-on experience with Elasticsearch, including indexing, search optimization, and performance tuning Experience working with Redis and other distributed systems concepts (caching strategies, pub/sub, data consistency) Good knowledge of microservices architecture and RESTful API design Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure and/or AWS is an advantage Proficient in Git-based version control systems (Git, GitHub, GitLab) Basic knowledge of React or Angular is a plus Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving, and architectural decision-making skills Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively within a team Proactive, ownership-driven, and results-oriented mindset Fluent in English, capable of working with global and cross-functional teams Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable and high-performance backend and/or frontend applications aligned with business objectives, Take ownership of end-to-end software development lifecycle — including analysis, design, implementation, testing, deployment, and maintenance, Collaborate closely with business analysts, architects, project managers, and other development teams to deliver effective and innovative solutions, Participate in architectural design and decision-making processes to ensure system scalability, performance, and maintainability, Conduct code reviews to uphold coding standards, best practices, and maintain code quality across projects, Proactively identify and resolve performance bottlenecks, technical risks, and system inefficiencies, Mentor junior developers and support their technical growth through guidance and code reviews, Engage in DevOps, CI/CD, and automation practices to enhance deployment efficiency and reliability, Stay current with emerging technologies, frameworks, and design patterns, continuously bringing innovation into the development cycle, Take ownership of assigned tasks and ensure delivery of clean, testable, and high-quality code within defined timelines.

title: Backend Developer (Laravel / REST API)
description: Şirketimiz için güçlü backend altyapıları geliştirebilecek, yüksek trafik altında stabil çalışan servislerin geliştirilmesinde katkı sağlayabilecek deneyimli bir Backend Developer arıyoruz. Sorumluluklar •⁠ ⁠Laravel tabanlı REST API geliştirme, bakım ve optimize etme •⁠ ⁠gRPC ve Protocol Buffers (protobuf) ile servisler arası senkron iletişim katmanları geliştirme •⁠ ⁠Mikro servis mimarisinde bağımsız, ölçeklenebilir servisler tasarlama ve hayata geçirme •⁠ ⁠PostgreSQL üzerinde veri modelleme, performans iyileştirme ve kompleks sorgular yazma •⁠ ⁠DTO mimarileri ile katmanlı ve sürdürülebilir kod yapıları oluşturma •⁠ ⁠Swagger / OpenAPI ile API dokümantasyonu hazırlama •⁠ ⁠RabbitMQ veya benzeri queue sistemleri ile asenkron iş akışları tasarlama Beklenen Teknik Yetenekler •⁠ ⁠Laravel 12+ frameworküne ileri seviye hakimiyet •⁠ ⁠RESTful API tasarım prensipleri ve best practice'lere hakimiyet •⁠ ⁠gRPC ve Protocol Buffers (protobuf) ile servisler arası iletişim deneyimi •⁠ ⁠Mikro servis mimarisi prensiplerine (servis sınırları, bağımsız deploy, hata izolasyonu) hakimiyet •⁠ ⁠Spatie Laravel Data, resource/DTO yapıları, request/response pipeline yönetimi •⁠ ⁠Laravel ve Scramble (veya benzeri) araçlarla otomatik olarak OpenAPI/Swagger üretimi •⁠ ⁠PostgreSQL'de ileri seviye bilgi: CTE, JSONB, index stratejileri, performans tuning •⁠ ⁠RabbitMQ, SQS veya benzeri mesaj kuyruğu servisleri •⁠ ⁠Git akışlarına ve versionlama pratiklerine hâkimiyet •⁠ ⁠Temiz kod, SOLID, DDD veya benzeri mimari prensiplere uygun geliştirme alışkanlığı Artı Kabul Edilebilecekler •⁠ ⁠Docker deneyimi •⁠ ⁠Docker Swarm, Kubernetes veya benzeri orchestration araçlarıyla deneyim •⁠ ⁠RoadRunner gibi yüksek performanslı PHP application server'larıyla çalışma deneyimi •⁠ ⁠⁠ClickHouse veya benzeri OLAP/sütun tabanlı veritabanlarıyla deneyim •⁠ ⁠MCP server geliştirme ve mevcut servislere AI entegrasyonu •⁠ ⁠Anthropic API ile tool use / function calling, structured output ve guardrail tasarımı •⁠ ⁠Subagent / paralel agent iş akışları ile çok adımlı görev otomasyonu •⁠ ⁠PHPUnit veya Pest ile test geliştirme

title: Full Stack Engineer (pooling)
description: Discover your 100% YOU with MicroSourcing! Position: Full Stack Engineer Location: Metro ﻿Manila Work setup & shift: Onsite Why join MicroSourcing? You'll Have Competitive Rewards: Enjoy above-market compensation, healthcare coverage on day one, plus one or more dependents, paid time-off with cash conversion, group life insurance, and performance bonuses A Collaborative Spirit: Contribute to a positive and engaging work environment by participating in company-sponsored events and activities. Work-Life Harmony: Enjoy the balance between work and life that suits you with flexible work arrangements. Career Growth: Take advantage of opportunities for continuous learning and career advancement. Inclusive Teamwork: Be part of a team that celebrates diversity and fosters an inclusive culture. Your Role As a Full Stack Engineer, you will: Design, develop, and maintain end-to-end web applications across frontend and backend layers. Build scalable RESTful APIs and integrate them with responsive user interfaces. Develop and manage relational and/or NoSQL databases to support application functionality. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define technical requirements and deliver high-quality solutions. Implement automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, and performance monitoring to ensure system reliability. What You Need Non-negotiables Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field 3+ years of experience in full stack development Strong proficiency in frontend technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js) Hands-on experience in backend development using languages such as Java, C#, Node.js, Python, or PHP Experience working with relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) and Git-based workflows Preferred Skills/expertise Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP Familiarity with containerization tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) Understanding of microservices architecture and API security best practices Experience with automated testing frameworks for frontend and backend Experience working in Agile/Scrum development environments About MicroSourcing With over 9,000 professionals across 13 delivery centers, MicroSourcing is the pioneer and largest offshore provider of managed services in the Philippines. Our commitment to 100% YOU MicroSourcing firmly believes that our company's strength lies in our people's diversity and talent. We are proud to foster an inclusive culture that embraces individuals of all races, genders, ethnicities, abilities, and backgrounds. We provide space for everyone, embracing different perspectives, and making room for opportunities for each individual to thrive. At MicroSourcing, equality is not merely a slogan – it's our commitment. Our way of life. Here, we don't just accept your unique authentic self - we celebrate it, valuing every individual's contribution to our collective success and growth. Join us in celebrating YOU and your 100%! For more information, visit https://www.microsourcing.com/ Terms & conditions apply.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: FULL STACK DEVELOPER | FORESIDE Je bent geen developer geworden om tickets weg te klikken. Je wilt bouwen. Leren. Beter worden. Impact maken. Bij Foreside werk je aan moderne software, cloud-native applicaties en AI-oplossingen die verder gaan dan alleen een chatbot aan een bestaande applicatie hangen. Denk aan agentic development, slimme workflows, MCP servers, AI-agents en het toepassen van modellen in echte businessprocessen. Je werkt met developers die hun vak serieus nemen. Teamgenoten die elkaar challengen en kennis delen. Geen lege buzzwords, maar serieuze inhoud. Wij organiseren kennissessies, bezoeken conferenties in binnen- en buitenland en investeren actief in jouw ontwikkeling. Wat je leert, pas je direct toe bij klanten waar technologie een cruciale rol speelt in hun business. Ons kantoor in Amsterdam is de uitvalsbasis. De sfeer is open, professioneel en nuchter. Korte lijnen, veel verantwoordelijkheid en ruimte om initiatief te nemen. WAT GA JE DOEN Als Full Stack Developer werk je aan moderne frontend en backend applicaties voor uiteenlopende opdrachtgevers. Je bent betrokken van eerste ontwerp tot livegang en doorontwikkeling. Je bouwt schaalbare en veilige oplossingen met oog voor performance en maintainability. Je werkt met moderne stacks, cloudomgevingen en AI-native tooling. Je denkt mee over architectuur, integratiepatronen en hoe AI slim kan worden ingezet binnen softwareproducten en bedrijfsprocessen. Daarbij kun je denken aan het bouwen van AI-agents, het opzetten van MCP servers, het integreren van LLMs, het ontwerpen van agentic workflows en het koppelen van modellen aan bestaande applicaties, data en systemen. Je neemt verantwoordelijkheid voor kwaliteit. Voor je code, voor het eindresultaat en voor je eigen ontwikkeling. Dit is geen rol voor iemand die wil blijven staan waar hij of zij nu staat. Wel voor iemand die de lat hoger wil leggen. WAT WIJ BIEDEN Uitstekend salaris en arbeidsvoorwaarden Contract voor onbepaalde tijd Leaseauto of mobiliteitsbudget Bonus en pensioenregeling Laptop naar keuze en onkostenvergoeding Uitdagende opdrachten voor diverse klanten Ruimte om je te ontwikkelen op het gebied van AI, cloud en moderne software-engineering JOUW VAARDIGHEDEN Een expert op jouw vakgebied of de drive om dat te worden Aantoonbare 3+ jaar werkervaring in front- en/of backend ontwikkeling Goed begrip van software design principles en -patterns Goede kennis van TypeScript en NodeJS Ervaring met React, Vue of Angular Ervaring met REST, GraphQL en/of gRPC Ervaring met Java (bij voorkeur Spring Boot) of Python is een pluspunt Interesse in of ervaring met AI-assisted en agentic development Ervaring met het bouwen, opzetten of integreren van AI-agents is een pluspunt Kennis van LLMs, MCP servers, RAG, embeddings of modelintegraties is een pluspunt Woonachtig in Nederland en goede beheersing van de Nederlandse taal Wil je ons team leren kennen? Reageer dan via LinkedIn, via https://www.foreside.nl/jobs/fullstack-developer of bel ons op 040 200 5805. VOOR RECRUITMENT- EN REMOTE DEVELOPMENT BUREAUS Wij werken uitsluitend met partners die wij hebben geselecteerd. Don’t call us, we'll call you ( The Hollywood Principle 😉)

title: Social Media Specialist & Full Stack Web Development Engineer
description: Social Media Specialist & Full Stack Web Development Engineer 📍 Cebu, Philippines | Full-Time | Hybrid Position Overview Are you passionate about creating engaging content, building brands, driving social media strategies, and building scalable websites? Collabtech Group is seeking a highly skilled and versatile professional to join our team as Social Media Specialist & Full Stack Web Development Engineer and take our online presence to new heights! This hybrid role combines expertise in digital marketing, social media management, website development, and web application support. The ideal candidate will be responsible for strengthening our digital presence through strategic social media initiatives while simultaneously developing, maintaining, and optimizing websites and web-based solutions. This role requires a unique blend of creativity, technical expertise, analytical thinking, and project management skills. About Collabtech Collabtech is a global services provider that enables organizations to collaborate effectively using the latest collaboration and unified communications (UCC) technologies . We specialize in providing expert deployment, training, and support services for leading conferencing solutions. We do not sell hardware or software—we focus on delivering services that drive adoption, optimize collaboration technology, and enhance user experience for our partners and customers worldwide. Key Responsibilities Social Media Strategy & Management Develop and implement social media marketing strategies to strengthen brand identity and expand audience reach. Manage company presence across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and other relevant platforms. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align social media strategies with company goals. Monitor industry trends and competitors to innovate and stay ahead in the digital space. Manage interactions with followers and foster community engagement. Content Creation & Digital Marketing Create engaging and creative content tailored to different platforms, including posts, videos, and graphics. Analyze social media metrics and performance data to optimize campaigns and increase engagement. Optimize content for SEO and audience engagement. Maintain brand consistency across all digital channels. Website Development & Management Design, develop, and maintain company websites and web applications using modern technologies and frameworks. Build and manage websites using platforms such as Squarespace, or other similar CMS solutions. Develop custom front-end and back-end functionality as business requirements dictate. Ensure website performance, responsiveness, security and scalability. Manage website hosting, deployments, and domain configurations. What We’re Looking For Education ✅ Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, marketing, Digital Media, Communications, or any related field. Experience ✅ 3-5 years of experience managing social media campaigns, collaborating with teams, and analyzing metrics to optimize strategies. ✅ Minimum 3-5 years of experience in full stack web development. ✅ Proven experience in managing social media platforms and implementing successful campaigns. ✅ Preferably with experience building websites using Squarespace. ✅ Proficiency in tools like LinkedIn, Facebook Ads Manager, Instagram, and Twitter. ✅ Familiarity with CRM tools such as Salesforce, Hubspot, or Zoho is a plus. ✅ Strong understanding of general IT services (preferred). ✅ Strong analytical and project management skills. ✅ Creative mindset and excellent communication abilities. ✅ Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks. Technical Skills Front-End Development ✅ HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript ✅ React.js, Angular, Vue.js, or equivalent frameworks ✅ Responsive and mobile-first design principles Back-End Development ✅ Node.js, PHP, Python, .NET, or similar technologies ✅ RESTful API development and integration Database Technologies ✅ MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQL Server Cloud Platform & Hosting ✅ AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform ✅ Website hosting and deployment management (GoDaddy preferred) Why Join Us? 🌎 Competitive Salary —Above-market pay for the right candidate! 🎯 Bonus & Commission Structure based on revenue performance 🏠 Hybrid or Remote Work Flexibility —Enjoy work-life balance while delivering results. 📚 Ongoing Training & Development —We invest in your technical and marketing expertise . 🚀 Career Growth —Be part of a fast-growing company in the global collaboration technology space.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: JOB DESCRIPTION: FULL STACK DEVELOPER About Company: Do you want to work in a fast growing company by doing meaningful work and have fun doing it? Remitbee, a FinTech with headquarters in Canada is seeking a skilled full stack developer with experience in React and Node JS. Individuals who apply for Remitbee careers should be passionate about tech and driven towards innovating the industry further with the Remitbee team. This position also comes with the opportunity for career growth and working hour flexibility. We look forward to reading your application. Job Type: Full time Experience: 3+ Years What will you do? - Work in an agile team of developers, QA, DevOps and founders - Implement new systems and redesign legacy systems, using leading technologies, to support advancing business requirements - Research and analyze business and system needs. Explore solution options to recommend designs and technologies - Writing test cases Skills and requirements: - At least 3+ years of experience in backend technologies like Node.js, Express - Experience with databases and ORM tools such as SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, or Sequelize - Experience in frontend technologies such as React JS, Next JS, Material UI - Experience with automated task runners such as Grunt or Gulp - Comfortable applying engineering best practices for Test Driven Development, integration testing, version control, release management, work estimation and planning - Experience working with APIs (REST, GraphQL, or SOAP) - You know how to use Git - You are passionate about code quality. Writing tests and documentation belong to your natural workflow - Participate in or lead all parts of the software development lifecycle, including analysis, design, programming, testing, implementation, and support - A history of active contributions to open-source projects (preferred) Competencies: - Strong communication skills - Self-Motivated - Willingness to learn new tools and technology and work in a collaborative environment

title: Full Stack Developer
description: About Frank Energie Frank Energie is a rapidly growing company located in the Amsterdam Zuidas district. We are revolutionizing the energy market, accelerating the energy transition, and making affordable sustainable energy accessible to everyone. We are young and ambitious, and we want to move fast. Working towards a greener world. We are already a major player in the Netherlands and are on the verge of conquering the rest of Europe. We expanded to Belgium, Spain and France. This year, we are heading to Denmark/Italy. Will you join us on this journey? Your job will be challenging, but for an ambitious person like you, definitely achievable. Your learning curve will be steep, and the growth opportunities are limitless. In addition to hard work, we also believe in relaxation and team-building activities – work hard, play hard. Who we need We are looking for a Full Stack Develope r, who will not only help us further develop our back-end and convert designs into digital products, but also wants to think along about the scalability, stability and maintainability of our infrastructure and the interaction and user experience of the products we create. We find it very important to continuously learn and innovate. In recent years, we have noted that the best products come from good collaboration. That is why we are looking for a real team player .We work with (new) technologies, such as React Native, Next.js, Node.js, and Typescript, but we don't jump on every hype train unless we are certain it makes our work better or easier. As a team, we are constantly looking at how we can improve. What do you bring with you? You have a variety of work experiences (5+ years). Moreover, you know how to adapt and react quickly to new situations. You have the courage to make decisions, are energetic, independent and have a positive attitude that is driven to perform. This will ensure that together we achieve our goals in an environment that is currently changing faster than any other industry. Your background and skills You are eager and fully committed, are working independently, proactively, and structured, and are taking responsibility for your projects; You have a variety of work experiences (5+ years). and want to grow further with Frank Energie; You have experience with Node.js, React & React Native, and Typescript (must), and experience with GraphQL, Next.js, and/or PostgreSQL (is a plus); You use AI-assisted development tools as part of your daily workflow and understand their limitations (e.g. code quality, security, hallucinations); You are skilled in HTML, CSS, responsive development, API integration, and unit testing, and have a keen eye for detail; You have a passion for clean, well-structured coding; You can give and receive feedback well (we value honesty); You are fluent in English, Dutch is a big plus. What is your working environment? As a Full Stack Developer, you work in a rapidly changing energy landscape, shaping the energy transition together with your team. A tough job, with challenging but achievable goals. We reward you for this with our good terms of employment. Besides the IT team, you will also work closely with our Smart Services, Design and Marketing team. What we offer Competitive salary package; Opportunity to earn a performance-related bonus; Employee discount on your energy contract; Laptop and accessories; A shared office at Amsterdam’s Zuidas with our sister companies; A challenging role in a dynamic and collaborative environment; Support for personal development and growth; Travel reimbursement; Team-building activities – work hard, play hard; Great coffee, drinks, fruit, and snacks at the office; Being part of a growing company where you can develop your skills and network. Do you want to join our team as our new Full Stack Developer? Then we'd love to hear about you!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Qualifications: Senior-level experience in Angular development, preferably on complex enterprise applications. Senior-level experience in Java development. Experience developing and consuming REST APIs . Working knowledge of Oracle PL/SQL or other SQL database scripting. Experience with Jira or similar ticketing/project management tools. Strong communication and collaboration skills in a multicultural environment, working with regional teams across different locations.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Requisition ID: 260428 Join a purpose driven winning team, committed to results, in an inclusive and high-performing culture. The Global Operations Technology (GOT) team develops and manages innovative products designed to support the ever-changing threat landscape. We work in close partnership with our Corporate Security, Fraud Business, and key Technology Partners throughout Scotiabank to drive technology on a global basis. We are key team members within Enterprise Technology to ensure business strategies, plans and initiatives are executed / delivered in compliance with governing regulations, internal policies, and procedures. We are seeking an energetic, self-starter willing to take on a challenge! This position will deliver against key internal fraud and insider threat solutions. This role will support both ongoing and new projects that serve our global stakeholders—including Internal Fraud, Corporate Security, AML, and Risk—by ensuring specific goals, plans, and initiatives align with the team’s business strategies and objectives through effective technology solutions. All activities must comply with governing regulations, internal policies, and procedures. In addition, the role will provide support for day-to-day operational activities, ensuring smooth execution of technology processes and addressing operational challenges as they arise. The incumbent is responsible, through independent contribution, collaboration with the stakeholders and the management/supervision of Senior Manager, on the design, development, integration, and implementation of Insider Threat/ Internal Fraud/ Enhanced Employee Monitoring initiative across the Enterprise level. The individual must thrive on challenge, be proactive and dynamic, and demonstrate initiative and eagerness to learn. Is this role right for you? In this role, you will: Design and maintain backend services to ensure seamless performance and security. Build and enhance front end applications, providing users with exceptional experience. Collaborate with product and UX teams to develop innovative solutions. Write clean, testable code that adheres to software design principles. Ensure application security and optimize performance for efficiency. Design robust software architecture and implement CI/CD pipelines. Participating in code reviews and integrating with third-party systems. Supporting production systems and mentoring junior developers. Improving engineering practices and contributing to team culture. Work closely with stakeholders to understand user needs and technical requirements Write and manage your own development tasks as Jira tickets with clear acceptance criteria Create high-fidelity mockups and prototypes Act as a core developer for both the frontend and backend-for-frontend components of the web application Contribute to team planning, sprint reviews, and roadmap discussions Gain a strong understanding of the development and deployment processes within the bank’s cloud infrastructure and governance environment Write clean, testable, and well-documented code aligned with security and compliance standard Skills Do you have the skills that will enable you to succeed in this role? We'd love to work with you if you have: Bachelor's degree in a technical field such as computer science, computer engineering or related field and 5+ years of full stack development experience required Proficiency in web development using HTML and CSS Experience writing and optimizing SQL queries Familiarity with development and deployment on cloud infrastructure (Google Cloud Platform preferred, AWS or Azure acceptable) Experience designing and integrating with APIs Proficiency in Node.js, Java, Net, TypeScript, and JavaScript. Experience with React, Angular, and REST APIs. Experience with relation and non relational databases Strong understanding of code quality practices, including linting, code reviews, and automated formatting tools Experience with Agile development methodologies and work in an Agile environment and adapt quickly to shifting priorities or direction Experience using Jira for issue tracking and sprint planning Proficient in gathering and integrating user feedback to drive ongoing product enhancement. Strong collaboration skills, with a willingness to work closely with engineers, designers, and product managers Motivated to understand stakeholder needs and contribute meaningfully to the product vision Skilled at estimating effort, setting realistic timelines, and being accountable for deliverables Proactively raises technical or product issues and contributes to problem-solving Strong problem-solving skills and a willingness to learn new technologies. What's in it for you? Diversity, Equity, Inclusion & Allyship - We strive to create an inclusive culture where every employee is empowered to reach their fullest potential, respected for who they are, and are embraced through bias-free practices and inclusive values across Scotiabank. We embrace diversity and provide opportunities for all employee to learn, grow & participate through our various Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) that span across diverse gender identities, ethnicity, race, age, ability & veterans. Accessibility and Workplace Accommodations - We value the unique skills and experiences each individual brings to the Bank, and are committed to creating and maintaining an inclusive and accessible environment for everyone. Scotiabank continues to locate, remove and prevent barriers so that we can build a diverse and inclusive environment while meeting accessibility requirements. Upskilling through online courses, cross-functional development opportunities, and tuition assistance. Competitive Rewards program including bonus, flexible vacation, personal, sick days and benefits will start on day one. Community Engagement - no matter where you choose to work from; we offer opportunities for community engagement & belonging with our various programs such as hackathons, contests, cooking with friends, Humans of Digital and much more! Location(s): Canada : Ontario : Toronto Scotiabank is a leading bank in the Americas. Guided by our purpose: "for every future", we help our customers, their families and their communities achieve success through a broad range of advice, products and services, including personal and commercial banking, wealth management and private banking, corporate and investment banking, and capital markets. At Scotiabank, we value the unique skills and experiences each individual brings to the Bank, and are committed to creating and maintaining an inclusive and accessible environment for everyone. If you require accommodation (including, but not limited to, an accessible interview site, alternate format documents, ASL Interpreter, or Assistive Technology) during the recruitment and selection process, please let our Recruitment team know. If you require technical assistance, please click here. Candidates must apply directly online to be considered for this role. We thank all applicants for their interest in a career at Scotiabank; however, only those candidates who are selected for an interview will be contacted.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
location: Tel Aviv-Yafo, Tel Aviv District, Israel
description: About Unframe Unframe is an AI-first startup helping the world’s largest enterprises bring LLM-powered applications to life in days - not months. We combine the speed of a product company with the flexibility of a consultancy, helping customers move from idea to deployed AI systems faster than anyone else in the market. With over $100M in TCV secured within 12 months, and a new $50M Series B led by Highland Europe, Unframe is rapidly scaling globally alongside Fortune 500 customers, backed by Bessemer, Craft, and TLV. About The Role As a Full Stack Software Engineer, you’ll work across the stack to design, implement, and ship high-quality workflows that solve real problems for real users. You’ll collaborate directly with product and enterprise customers, see your code in production within days, and be part of a team that values ownership and thoughtful execution. What You’ll Do Develop and deliver full-stack AI-powered applications on top of Unframe’s platform. Work closely with customers and internal teams to tailor solutions. Extend the platform and UI/UX layer as needed. Collaborate with platform and research teams to integrate AI capabilities into production use. Write clean, tested, and maintainable code. What We Are Looking For 4 + years of hands-on software-engineering experience. Proven record of shipping real user-facing products end-to-end. Proficiency with JavaScript, Node.js, Vue\React and PostgreSQL. Strong communication skills and a product mindset. Ownership mentality - comfortable taking a feature from idea to production. Nice To Have Experience working with AI or LLM-based applications. Experience working with B2B or enterprise customers. Why join us? Real ownership from day one. Drive decisions, shape ideas and make them work. Your fastest learning years. Build alongside founders and VPs in a space that moves weekly. You'll have the opportunity to write and build what comes next. Ready to Build the Future? If this opportunity excites you, apply now!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: דרושים/ות Full stack Engineers – Frontend oriented לסטרטאפ מצליח בתחום Sales-Tech, פיצוץ של חברה! מקום עבודה מעולה – באחריות! לאחר גיוס גדול. אוירה נעימה, מנהל מדהים! ואחלה אנשים לעבוד אתם 😊 יושבים בת"א, מאפשרים 3 ימי עבודה מהבית. לאנשים שגרים בחו"ל יש אפשרות לעבודה מרחוק. דרישות חובה: מצטיינים / יוצאי יחידות טכנולוגיות וכדומה. מעל 5 שנות ניסיון ב React מעל 4 שנות ניסיון ב Backend עדיפות ל Node.JS. קו"ח שולחים אלי ואשמח לשיתופים, טל tal@medulla.co.il

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Qualification needed : 1. Minimum 3-8+ years of professional experience as a Fullstack Engineer or equivalent role. 2. Strong proficiency in Node.js and NestJS framework 3. Deep expertise in React and Next.js with experience in state management ( Redux, Zustand), SSR/SSG , and frontend architecture. 4. Advanced knowledge of SQL databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB), including query optimization and data modeling. 5. Extensive experience with microservice architecture , message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ) , and distributed systems. 6. Proven experience with Redis caching strategies, including distributed caching and cache invalidation patterns. 7. Strong understanding of RESTful API design, GraphQL, and API security best practices (OAuth, JWT). 8. Experience with CI/CD pipelines , containerization (Docker) , and o rchestration tools (Kubernetes) . 9. Demonstrated ability to mentor engineers and lead technical initiatives. 10. Experience in banking, financial services, or loyalty/rewards systems is highly preferred. 11. Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.

title: Full Stack Lead Developer
description: Low Carbon Materials Hub is a construction sustainability tech start-up based in Melbourne, Australia . We are committed to tracking and reducing carbon emissions in the global construction industry by promoting the adoption of low carbon materials in construction. We are still early-stage, which means that anyone joining now will have meaningful influence over the product, engineering culture, and long-term direction of the company. We are hiring a Full Stack Lead Developer to help us build and scale our platform end-to-end. This is not a “ticket-taking” developer role. We are looking for someone who: enjoys building products from scratch end-to-end, thinks deeply about users and product experience, can move across frontend, backend, architecture, and deployment, and takes real ownership over what they build. You will work directly with the CTO and play a major role in shaping both the product and the engineering direction of the company. We are looking for someone with experience in: Next.js Node.js TypeScript Familiarity with AI-assisted product development workflows (is a big plus) This role is ideal for someone who: wants to help build a company from an early stage, enjoys solving messy real-world problems, prefers impact and ownership over rigid corporate structures, and wants meaningful influence over the product they are building. We offer: Competitive base salary Meaningful equity package Performance-based bonus Remote working arrangement with half-yearly team-offsite for up to 4 weeks

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We are currently partnering with an AI-driven investment research company focused on global secondary financial markets. The company is building next-generation AI research infrastructure and agent systems to support professional investment workflows. title: Medior Full Stack Developer
description: Medior Full Stack Developer (3–7 jaar) – Digitale Voordeur Amsterdam Wil jij bouwen aan technologie die écht impact maakt? Bij ahti werken we als publieke startup aan de Digitale Voordeur: een platform dat zorg en welzijn toegankelijker maakt voor alle Amsterdammers. Hier werk je aan mee Veel Amsterdammers lopen vast in het vinden van de juiste hulp. Daarom bouwen wij aan één digitale voordeur: een plek waar mensen snel de juiste hulp vinden, hun gegevens veilig meenemen en zelf bepalen met wie ze die delen. Simpel, veilig en voor iedereen — zoals hulp hoort te zijn. Als publieke startup bouwen we dit niet op afstand, maar samen met inwoners en professionals, midden in de praktijk. Concreet bouw je mee aan twee apps in React Native: Lumi en HealthEmove. Je werkt aan AI-componenten die mensen helpen hun hulpvraag te verwoorden, en aan koppelingen met zorgdata via bestaande standaarden. De uitdaging: dit werkend krijgen in een complexe, gereguleerde omgeving en tegelijk toegankelijk houden voor alle Amsterdammers. Jouw rol ·      Werken aan front-end en back-end ·      Features bouwen van ontwerp tot productie ·      Verbeteren van performance, schaalbaarheid en security ·      Meedenken over technische keuzes en architectuur Het Team Je werkt in een team van circa zes developers en twee product owners. Het is een klein, gedreven team waarbij iedereen eigenaarschap pakt en korte lijnen de norm zijn. Dit neem je mee ·      3–7 jaar ervaring als developer ·      Ervaring met React Native en Python ·      Kennis van FastAPI, AWS en mobile development is een pre ·      Proactieve houding en samenwerken in een klein team ·      Je bent woonachtig in Nederland en beheerst de Nederlandse taal voldoende Dit bieden wij ·      Salaris: €5.194 – €5.696 bruto p/m (40 uur) ·      Werken in een publieke startup met maatschappelijke impact ·      Veel ruimte voor groei en eigenaarschap ·      Hybride werken (Amsterdam Zuidoost + thuis) ·      Direct impact op zorg en welzijn Spreekt dit je aan? Leuk! Laten we dan snel kennismaken. We geloven dat een gesprek de snelste manier is om erachter te komen of we bij elkaar passen. Stuur een mail naar carriere@ahti.nl met je CV en een korte toelichting en dan plannen we een telefoontje, een Teams-meeting of een live-gesprek met koffie. Net wat past! **Acquisitie naar aanleiding van deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld**

title: Full Stack/Backend Engineer

Yale Engineering founding team. Paying clients. VC-backed. Growing & hiring. title: Full Stack Engineer
description: About Our Client Our client is a forward-thinking climate tech startup dedicated to building innovative products for carbon accounting. Their mission is to empower companies to actively measure and reduce their environmental footprint. By combining technical excellence with a strong sustainability drive, they are creating practical solutions for a greener future. Joining this organization means becoming part of a small, highly experienced team where your work will have a direct and lasting impact on both the product and the planet. Role Overview We are looking for a product-minded Full-Stack Engineer to take a leading role in building and scaling impactful climate tech products. In this position, you will enjoy a high level of ownership, directly influencing both product strategy and engineering decisions. Working in a collaborative, fast-paced startup environment, you will take features from concept to production , ensuring the delivery of robust and practical solutions. This role is based in Rotterdam and operates on a flexible hybrid working model. Key Responsibilities Product Development & Engineering ● Design, build, and ship production -ready features end-to-end using Django and TypeScript ( NextJS ). ● Contribute to architectural decisions and shape the technical direction of the platform. ● Ensure high-quality, maintainable code while balancing development speed and practical problem-solving. Ownership & Strategy ● Take full ownership of the product lifecycle, influencing both engineering and product decisions. ● Solve complex challenges holistically across engineering, product, and operations. ● Drive initiatives from the ideation phase through to successful deployment. Collaboration & Innovation ● Work closely within a small, experienced team to iterate quickly on user feedback and business needs. ● Continuously learn and explore new technologies to improve the platform's capabilities. ● Bring a proactive approach to identifying areas for improvement in both the codebase and the product offering. Skills & Experience Essential ● 3–5 years of hands-on experience in full-stack software engineering. ● Strong proficiency in backend development with Django. ● Solid experience with frontend development using TypeScript and NextJS. ● Proven track record of shipping production features end-to-end. ● A genuine interest in climate tech, sustainability, and making a positive environmental impact. Nice to Have ● Experience with AI and Large Language Model (LLM) integrations. ● Familiarity with Google Cloud Platform (GCP). ● Previous experience thriving in a fast-paced startup environment. Ideal Profile The ideal candidate is a product-minded generalist who is self-driven, ambitious, and naturally curious. You learn quickly, take strong ownership of your work, and thrive in small teams where you can build practical, impactful solutions. You are not just looking to write code; you enjoy solving broad problems and care deeply about the user experience and the environmental mission behind the products you build. 👉 Ready to build impactful software that helps reduce corporate carbon footprints? Apply now and help shape the future of sustainability and climate tech!

title: Full Stack Engineer

Our client services major clients across the UK and global markets, and is scaling rapidly with strong investment in people and technology. In under three years they have grown from a concept to nearly 800 people and are on a clear path to 1,000+. They operate as an offshore delivery hub for major international clients — primarily across the UK — building and running complex technology solutions at scale. For their engineers, it means genuinely global work, without leaving home. Note that this is NOT a specific job description but rather a generic one that’s designed to capture a large pool of candidates within this space. What We'll Be Looking For We are looking for talented Full Stack Software Engineers at all levels — mid, senior, and lead. You will work in agile, cross-functional teams designing, building, and maintaining digital products and services for international clients. This is not maintenance work. You will be solving real problems at scale, building new capabilities, and contributing to a delivery engine that sits at the heart of a major international consulting network. Work on international-grade projects from South Africa — clients span the UK and beyond Your employer invests heavily in learning: certifications, conferences, and a global AI academy Be part of a high-growth business — headcount has more than doubled year on year Join one of South Africa's fastest-growing technology businesses — headcount has more than doubled year on year and they are not slowing down Permanent role with competitive salary, medical aid, and above-market provident fund How to Apply This is a talent pool registration — not a live vacancy. Submit your CV to Collage Recruitment and you will be added to our active talent pool. You become instantly visible to us when we search, meaning you are front of mind the moment a matching role is confirmed.

title: Full Stack Lead Developer

title: IT Full Stack Developer
description: Job Summary The ideal candidate will be well-versed in the full software development life cycle (SDLC). They should have a proven track record in designing, coding, testing, and managing web-based applications. A strong proficiency in both .NET and PHP ecosystems is essential, along with the ability to maintain legacy systems, build modern APIs, implement automation, and ensure high-quality, scalable code. Responsibilities: Design, code, test, and manage robust applications based on business requirements. Maintain, optimize, and upgrade existing applications built on both .NET and PHP platforms. Develop, consume, and secure RESTful APIs / Web Services for seamless system integration. Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate software deployment and testing processes. Manage source code repositories efficiently, ensuring proper branching strategies and code review workflows. Follow outlined standards of quality related to clean code, security best practices, and database performance tuning. Analyze, debug, and resolve technical errors or production issues efficiently. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design effective and efficient enterprise software solutions. Qualifications: Core Technical Skills: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field. Minimum 2 years of proven experience as a Full-stack Developer, Software Engineer, or similar role. Strong proficiency in the .NET ecosystem: C#, ASP.NET MVC, and .NET Core / .NET 6+. Strong proficiency in the PHP ecosystem: Modern PHP (7.x/8.x) and popular frameworks (preferably Laravel or Symfony). Solid understanding of Relational Databases: SQL Server (T-SQL) and MySQL/MariaDB (writing efficient queries, views, and stored procedures). Hands-on experience with front-end basics: HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (experience with modern frameworks like Vue.js or React is a plus). Infrastructure, Deployment & Tools Mastery: Proficiency with Git-based version control systems (GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket) with a solid understanding of Git Workflow (Branching, Pull Requests, Code Review). Familiarity with CI/CD tools (e.g., GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD) to automate pipelines. Experience with containerization using Docker and managing server environments (Linux/Ubuntu or Windows/IIS) is a plus. Active experience in utilizing AI-assisted coding tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude/Cline, Cursor, or similar LLMs) to accelerate development and debugging processes. Soft Skills: Strong analytical mind, quick learner for new technologies, and a proactive problem-solver. Ability to work effectively in both independent and collaborative environments.

Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve technical issues in collaboration with cross-functional teams. Implement security best practices including authentication, authorization, encryption, and threat mitigation. Write clean, scalable, maintainable, and well-documented code. Manage external vendors to ensure timely, cost-effective, and high-quality project delivery. Contribute to Agile planning, sprint execution, and user story delivery within a Scrum environment. Provide production support during non-office hours when required. Explore and evaluate emerging technologies and assess their potential business impact

title: Full Stack Developer - Amsterdam
description: Handelsbanken is growing fast so we are continuously looking for new professionals who would like to join us in developing the bank further. For our local IT department, we are looking for a Full Stack Developer with broad experiences in Java and React. This is not just any role – it is your chance to make a real impact and be a driving force in the evolution of Handelsbanken. From our buzzing headquarters in Amsterdam Zuid Oost, you will be diving headfirst into full-stack development for our local applications and integrations across the Netherlands. Our ideal candidate would have a proven track-record in the above mentioned technology stacks on both front-end and back-end. If you are looking to make a meaningful impact and thrive in an open environment, we encourage you to apply and be part of our journey at Handelsbanken. Your role: You will be the bridge between business needs and IT solutions through collecting requirements and translating (business) demands into a suitable IT solution. Your code will be one of the backbones of our systems, so it must be clean, reliable, and secure – and you'll make sure of it with automated tests and code reviews. You will bring new features to life and keep our existing solutions running smoothly (incl. technical upgrades). üCollaboration is key at Handelsbanken! You will work closely with other teams to ensure seamless integration. You will participate actively in daily scrums, refinement, review, and planning sessions, where your input could shape the direction of our projects. You will be keen to continuously develop yourself. Our offer: A salary of minimum €3.809 and a maximum of €6.534 gross per month, based on a 40-hour working week, depending on your knowledge and experience, A 13th month and 8% holiday pay. You can choose to have this paid out per month. 30 days holiday per year (based on a 40-hour working week) and the option to buy or sell additional holiday days. A non-contributory pension scheme. Profit-sharing scheme, mortgage interest discount (under certain conditions) and a non-contributory disability insurance scheme. Your profile: You reside in the Netherlands and are eligible to work here (we do not offer visa sponsorship). A Bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT, and 5+ years of professional experience in software development within a DevOps team. Experience with the banking sector is a big plus. Strong hands-on mentality. You enjoy making things work! Good learning skills, and open to learn different technologies and business domains. Demonstrable back-end experience using Java 17+, preferably with JakartaEE. Demonstrable front-end experience using React. Knowledge and experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL. Experience with IT infrastructure on an enterprise level. Excellent English speaking and writing skills is a must. Dutch would be a plus. You are willing to travel abroad (occasionally). How to apply?: Do you want to work as Full Stack Developer (Java/React), make an impact and add value to Handelsbanken? Then apply immediately for this vacancy! If you have any questions, please contact Lokke Boomsma (HR Business Partner) at lokke.boomsma@handelsbanken.nl. Read more about our application process here. Tip: your cover letter is important to is, it shows that you have thought carefully about why you would like to work at Handelsbanken. Disclaimer externe recruitmentbureaus Acquisitie naar aanleiding van deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld. Externe recruitmentbureaus die een overeenkomst met Handelsbanken hebben getekend mogen alleen CV's met ons delen als zij daarvoor een zoekopdracht namens onze recruiters hebben gekregen. Alle ongevraagde CV's die buiten deze voorwaarden aan ons worden aangeboden zullen als eigendom van Handelsbanken worden beschouwd. Derhalve is Handelsbanken geen plaatsingskosten verschuldigd.
